message:
fix(e2e): fix monitor test flag detection and help text assertion

1. Added supportsFlag() function in monitor_test.go for checking global
   flags (like --robot-monitor) by examining main help output, rather
   than incorrectly using supportsCommand() which runs the flag as a
   subcommand.

2. Fixed TestWatchCommandExists assertion to check for "watch"/"Watch"
   instead of "Stream agent output" which doesn't appear at the start
   of the help text.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
